text_block_list.text: One day, during training camp...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer, do you have a minute?
choice_data_list: What's wrong?
What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Nothing, just... Can I borrow you for a second?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, no one is around...
choice_data_list:
Is there something you want to talk to me
about?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Um, it's not a big deal, but about our training...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Tell it to me straight. What do you think is
lacking in my performance?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Don't say "everything," though. That'd just make
me sad.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I want to do some extra training, but first, I need
your expert opinion. So lay it on me.
choice_data_list: Sure, but why all of a sudden?
Sure, but why all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
See, I'm behind all the others when it comes to
training and race experience.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... I'm competing with Teio here, aren't I?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I know it's going to be super, super hard going up against her.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: So I want to be as ready as I can be.

Although still anxious about her prospects, it's
clear Nice Nature is motivated. If that's the case,
what I can say to her is...
choice_data_list: You should work on your core at the beach.
Let's do some mental training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh... And what exactly do you mean?

I suggest that she train on the sand to strengthen
her core, which can lead to more stability during
races.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
That's true. A strong core is important. Okay, I'll
do it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right, then I'm off to train. See ya la—
choice_data_list: But I'm not allowing any training by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? Why? You just gave me advice for it.
choice_data_list: I'll only allow it if I'm there with you.
I'll only allow it if I'm there with you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait... You want to join me for extra
training?
choice_data_list: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aw man, are you sure? Sorry... I'm sure you have
other things you need to do.
choice_data_list: Nothing is more important than supporting you.
Nothing is more important than supporting you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You really don't hesitate saying cheesy things like
that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
M-mental training? What do you mean by that
exactly?!

I suggest that she add time limits to her exercises
to be more prepared for the pressure during
races.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I get it now. I'm glad it wasn't some extreme
method.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Okay, now that I got the gist of it, I'll get starte—
choice_data_list: But I'm not allowing any training by yourself.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: What? Why? You just gave me advice for it.
choice_data_list: I'll only allow it if I'm there with you.
I'll only allow it if I'm there with you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Wait... You want to join me for extra
training?
choice_data_list: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Aw man, are you sure? Sorry... I'm sure you have
other things you need to do.
choice_data_list: Nothing is more important than supporting you.
Nothing is more important than supporting you.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You really don't hesitate saying cheesy things like
that...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: All right! Let's get back to training.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, sorry to bother you. You can go back
now if you want.
choice_data_list:
Why did we have to come all the way over
here?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, you know... I just figured this isn't
something other people should hear.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I wanted to ask you about your top secret
training routine, which I'm sure you don't want
getting out.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Plus, I definitely don't want others to know that
I'm doing this to compete with Teio.

It seems Nice Nature still isn't confident enough
to openly compete with such a strong racer.
